narrative:
Lucas County has 285,187 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.9 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 27.4% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +9.6% D−R vs +19.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
